keymaps.name: Mike's Layout
keymaps.description:
Mod -> Right spacebar (actual mod layer)
Fn2 -> Left Mod key (actually a fn2 layer)
Fn3 -> Semicolon mode

keymaps.name: Normal
keymaps.description: QWERTY is the mother of all layouts. This is the Mac version.

keymaps.name: Vim Mode
keymaps.description: This is an empty keymap. Let's start from scratch!

keymaps.name: Vim Mode OLD
keymaps.description: This is an empty keymap. Let's start from scratch!

macroActions.command:
ifShift final holdKey 1
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f1
tapKey 1

ifPrimary advancedStrategy final tapKey c
holdKey CSAG-c

macros.name: [dual] LCommand and "If Exists Trigger Action Menu"

macroActions.command:
ifSecondary simpleStrategy final holdKey iLG
tapKey CG-f13

ifGui final holdKey v
ifPrimary advancedStrategy final tapKey v
holdKey CSAG-x

ifPrimary advancedStrategy final holdKey semicolonAndColon
holdLayer fn3

ifShift tapKey LCSG-minusAndUnderscore
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-minusAndUnderscore

ifShift tapKey LCSG-commaAndLessThanSign
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-commaAndLessThanSign

ifShift tapKey LCSG-dotAndGreaterThanSign
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-dotAndGreaterThanSign

ifShift tapKey LCSG-slashAndQuestionMark
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-slashAndQuestionMark

ifShift tapKey LCSG-0
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-0

ifShift tapKey LCSG-1
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-1

ifShift tapKey LCSG-2
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-2

ifShift tapKey LCSG-3
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-3

ifShift tapKey LCSG-4
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-4

ifShift tapKey LCSG-5
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-5

ifShift tapKey LCSG-6
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-6

ifShift tapKey LCSG-7
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-7

ifShift tapKey LCSG-8
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-8

ifShift tapKey LCSG-9
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-9

ifShift tapKey LCSG-h
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-h

ifShift tapKey LG-closingBracketAndClosingBrace
ifNotShift tapKey LSG-closingBracketAndClosingBrace

ifShift tapKey LCSG-j
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-j

ifShift tapKey LCSG-k
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-k

ifShift tapKey LCSG-l
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-l

ifShift tapKey LCSG-m
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-m
holdLayer fn2

ifShift tapKey LCSG-n
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-n

ifShift tapKey LCSG-o
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-o

ifShift tapKey LG-openingBracketAndOpeningBrace
ifNotShift tapKey LSG-openingBracketAndOpeningBrace

setVar altHeld 1
pressKey LA-
delayUntil 100
tapKey q

ifShift tapKey LCS-equalAndPlus
ifNotShift tapKey LCSG-equalAndPlus

ifShortcut anyOrder semicolonAndColon a final tapKey LG-c
holdKey l

ifShortcut anyOrder l a final tapKey LG-c
holdKey semicolonAndColon

macros.name: [shortcut] Double tap q when holding down command to quit

macroActions.command:
ifGui ifDoubletap final tapKey q
ifGui final noOp
holdKey q

macros.name: [shortcut] Super key when held and activate VIM key layout when pressed

macroActions.command:
ifSecondary simpleStrategy final holdKey iLSACG
switchKeymap VIM
setVar count ($count * 10 + 1)

ifShift final suppressMods playMacro q
setVar count ($count * 10 + 2)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 3)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 5)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 6)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 7)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 8)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 9)

// Ctrl+b = page up
ifCtrl final suppressMods tapKey pageUp
// V-LINE: no-op
if ($mode == 3) final setVar count 0
// VISUAL: extend selection
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) final autoRepeat tapKey LSA-left
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey LA-left
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 2
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKeySeq LSA-left
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LSA-left
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey LA-left
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

// Ctrl+d = half page down
ifNotCtrl goTo afterCtrlD
setVar count 30
ctrlDLoop:
suppressMods tapKey down
repeatFor count ctrlDLoop
final setVar count 0
afterCtrlD:
noOp
// Visual mode: delete selection
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) tapKey backspace
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar operator 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 255 255
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) final setVar mode 0
// Shift+D = delete to end of line
ifNotShift goTo afterShiftD
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 5
setVar lastCount $count
shiftDLoop:
suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
suppressMods tapKey backspace
repeatFor count shiftDLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterShiftD:
// First d press: enter operator mode (early exit)
if ($operator == 0) final setVar operator 1
// dd = delete whole line
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 4
setVar lastCount $count
ddLoop:
tapKey LG-left
tapKeySeq LSG-right
tapKey backspace
tapKey delete
repeatFor count ddLoop
setVar operator 0
setVar count 0

// J = join lines (Shift+j)
ifShift final suppressMods tapKeySeq LG-right delete
// VISUAL modes: extend selection down
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) final autoRepeat tapKey LS-down
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey down
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 6
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKey LG-left
tapKeySeq LSG-right LS-down
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
suppressMods tapKey LG-left
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LS-down
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey down
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

// V-LINE: no-op
if ($mode == 3) final setVar count 0
// VISUAL: extend selection
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) final autoRepeat tapKey LSA-right
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey LA-right
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 3
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKeySeq LSA-right
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LSA-right
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey LA-right
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

// V-LINE: no-op
if ($mode == 3) final setVar count 0
// VISUAL: extend selection left
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) final autoRepeat tapKey LS-left
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey left
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 8
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKeySeq LS-left
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LS-left
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey right
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey left
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

noOp
// Visual mode: paste over selection
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) suppressMods tapKey LG-v
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 255 255
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) final setVar mode 0
// Shift+P: go to end of line, new line, paste
ifShift suppressMods tapKey LG-right
ifShift suppressMods tapKey enter
ifShift final suppressMods tapKey LG-v
// normal paste
suppressMods tapKey LG-v
suppressMods tapKey LSG-z

// V-LINE: no-op
if ($mode == 3) final setVar count 0
// VISUAL: extend selection right
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) final autoRepeat tapKey LS-right
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey right
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 9
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKeySeq LS-right
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LS-right
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey right
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

// Ctrl+u = half page up
ifNotCtrl goTo afterCtrlU
setVar count 30
ctrlULoop:
suppressMods tapKey up
repeatFor count ctrlULoop
final setVar count 0
afterCtrlU:
ifShift suppressMods final tapKey LSG-z
suppressMods tapKey LG-z
untoggleLayer

// VISUAL modes: extend selection up
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) final autoRepeat tapKey LS-up
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKey up
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 7
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKey up
tapKey LG-left
tapKeySeq LSG-right LS-down
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
suppressMods tapKey LG-right
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKey LS-up
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-left
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKey up
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

// Shift+V: exit V-LINE → NORMAL (suppressMods to release physical shift)
ifShift if ($mode == 3) suppressMods tapKey left
ifShift if ($mode == 3) setVar operator 0
ifShift if ($mode == 3) setVar count 0
ifShift if ($mode == 3) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 255 255
ifShift if ($mode == 3) final setVar mode 0
// Shift+V: VISUAL → V-LINE (deselect then select full line)
ifShift if ($mode == 2) suppressMods tapKey right
ifShift if ($mode == 2) suppressMods tapKey LG-left
ifShift if ($mode == 2) suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
ifShift if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
ifShift if ($mode == 2) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 0 0 255
ifShift if ($mode == 2) final setVar mode 3
// Shift+V: NORMAL → V-LINE (select current line)
ifShift suppressMods tapKey LG-left
ifShift suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
ifShift setVar operator 0
ifShift setVar count 0
ifShift set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 0 0 255
ifShift final setVar mode 3
// v: exit VISUAL → NORMAL
if ($mode == 2) tapKey right
if ($mode == 2) setVar operator 0
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 255 255
if ($mode == 2) final setVar mode 0
// v: V-LINE → VISUAL
if ($mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 3) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 0 0
if ($mode == 3) final setVar mode 2
// v: NORMAL → VISUAL
setVar mode 2
setVar operator 0
setVar count 0
set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 0 0
autoRepeat tapKey LSA-left
autoRepeat tapKey LS-down
autoRepeat tapKey LSA-right
autoRepeat tapKey LS-left

suppressMods tapKey LG-v
untoggleLayer
autoRepeat tapKey LS-right
autoRepeat tapKey LS-up
autoRepeat tapKeySeq LSA-right LS-right

tapKey backspace
untoggleLayer

suppressMods tapKey LG-c
untoggleLayer

// V-LINE: no-op
if ($mode == 3) final setVar count 0
// VISUAL: extend selection word-right
if ($mode == 2) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2) final autoRepeat tapKeySeq LSA-right LS-right
// NORMAL motion (early exit)
if ($operator == 0 && $count == 0) final autoRepeat tapKeySeq LA-right right
// DELETE operator
if ($operator != 1) goTo afterDelete
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
setVar lastOperator 1
setVar lastMotion 1
setVar lastCount $count
deleteLoop:
tapKeySeq LSA-right LS-right
tapKey backspace
repeatFor count deleteLoop
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
afterDelete:
// YANK operator
if ($operator != 2) goTo countedMotion
if ($count == 0) setVar count 1
yankLoop:
suppressMods tapKeySeq LSA-right LS-right
repeatFor count yankLoop
suppressMods tapKey LG-c
delayUntil 50
suppressMods tapKey left
setVar operator 0
final setVar count 0
// Counted NORMAL motion
countedMotion:
if ($count == 0) final noOp
countLoop:
tapKeySeq LA-right right
repeatFor count countLoop
setVar count 0

noOp
// Visual mode: yank selection, deselect
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) suppressMods tapKey LG-c
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) tapKey left
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) setVar count 0
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) set backlight.constantRgb.rgb 255 255 255
if ($mode == 2 || $mode == 3) final setVar mode 0
// Shift+Y → copy from cursor to end of line, keep cursor in place
ifShift suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
ifShift suppressMods tapKey LG-c
ifShift delayUntil 50
ifShift final suppressMods tapKey left
// yy → copy full line (second y press when operator already 2)
if ($operator == 2) suppressMods tapKey LG-left
if ($operator == 2) suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
if ($operator == 2) suppressMods tapKey LG-c
if ($operator == 2) suppressMods tapKey LG-right
if ($operator == 2) setVar count 0
if ($operator == 2) final setVar operator 0
// y + motion: set yank operator pending
setVar operator 2
ifPrimary final tapKey `

macros.name: Go to UHK site in browser
Tap to Escape, Hold to Shift

macroActions.command:
ifPrimary final tapKey escape
holdLayer fn

macroActions.text:
Silent Bob
711-2880 Nulla St.
Mankato Mississippi 96522
(257) 563-7401

macroActions.command:
setVar operator 0
setVar count 0
suppressMods tapKey LG-f
switchKeymap MIK

// S = substitute entire line (Shift+s)
ifShift setVar operator 0
ifShift setVar count 0
ifShift suppressMods tapKey LG-left
ifShift suppressMods tapKeySeq LSG-right
ifShift suppressMods tapKey backspace
ifShift final switchKeymap MIK
// s = substitute character
setVar operator 0
setVar count 0
tapKey delete
switchKeymap MIK

// Ctrl+f = page down
ifCtrl final suppressMods tapKey pageDown

if ($altHeld == 1) releaseKey LA-
if ($altHeld == 1) setVar altHeld 0

ifShift tapKey LCSG-x
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-x

stopRecording
startRecording q
stopRecording

ifShift final holdKey 2
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f2
tapKey 2

ifShift final holdKey 3
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f3
tapKey 3

ifShift final holdKey 4
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f4
tapKey 4

ifShift final holdKey 5
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f5
tapKey 5

ifShift final holdKey 6
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f6
tapKey 6

ifShift final holdKey 7
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f7
tapKey 7

ifShift final holdKey 8
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f8
tapKey 8

ifShift final holdKey 9
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f9
tapKey 9

ifShift final holdKey 0
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f10
tapKey 0

ifShift final holdKey minusAndUnderscore
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f11
tapKey minusAndUnderscore

ifShift final holdKey equalAndPlus
delayUntilRelease
ifPlaytime 200 final tapKey f12
tapKey equalAndPlus

ifGesture $thisKeyId $thisKeyId final write 'O(n^3)'
ifGesture $thisKeyId final write 'O(n^2)'
holdKey closingBracketAndClosingBrace
